creator: max@idfw.com
text:
My system is a Pentium 166 with a MAtsonic MS-5120 Motherboard. I have been running FreeBSD on this system since 2.2.5-RELEASE. Every upgrade since then has worked fine. When I attempt to install 4.0-RELEASE it will not recognize my IDE controllers.

How-To-Repeat: Run the install from floppies.
